name: Aioli (Kfnr49b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the crusts from the bread and soak in milk.
2. Squeeze out any excess moisture from the bread slices.
3. Place the bread slices in a large mortar and mash with a pestle until a fine paste is formed.
4. Add egg yolks, salt, and garlic to the mortar and mash everything together.
5. Slowly drizzle in olive oil while continuously mashing with the pestle. Keep adding oil drop by drop until the sauce thickens.
6. Thin the sauce with boiling water and lemon juice to your desired consistency.
